zoteroconnector-import-not-found:
Error message for missing items

Parameters:
* $1 - the item ID requested
zoteroconnector-import-no-subpage: Error message when accessing [[Special:ZoteroImporter]] without a subpage
zoteroconnector-import-invalid-subpage: Error message when accessing [[Special:ZoteroImporter]] with a bad subpage
zoteroconnector-auto-update: Automatic attachment page update edit summary
zoteroconnector-import-type-reference: Radio input label for specific option
zoteroconnector-import-type-attachment: Radio input label for specific option
zoteroconnector-import-reference-is-atta: Note when trying to import an attachment as a reference
zoteroconnector-import-reference-no-chan:
Message when no reference page changed

Parameters:
* $1 - the item ID requested
zoteroconnector-import-reference-success:
Message when reference page updated

Parameters:
* $1 - the item ID requested
zoteroconnector-upload-attachment-no-cha:
Message when no upload performed for an attachment

Parameters:
* $1 - the attachment ID requested
zoteroconnector-attachment-page-updated:
Message when only a page content update for an attachment was performed

Parameters:
* $1 - the attachment ID requested
zoteroconnector-upload-attachment-succes:
Message when attachment was uploaded

Parameters:
* $1 - the attachment ID requested
zotero-file-current-version-info: Label for version in action=info output
